caption:
Replit’s Agent 4 is insane 😍

This video shows how Replit Agent 4 collapses the old design-to-code handoff into one flow. The big shift is that design, backend, logic, and even extra outputs like mobile apps, slides, and animations can now live inside one project, so you think, design, and build at the same time instead of bouncing between tools. It’s basically the first time coding starts to feel like creative work instead of a handoff problem
.
.
#replit #replitagent4 #productdesign #aitools
.
.

latestIgtvVideos.title: Click here for full video ⬇️
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Full Video: https://youtu.be/oaFK-hInvi8

I am a self taught designer, i.e. I taught design to my own self without enrolling into any course or curriculum. Some of the greatest designers that I have worked with were also self-taught, just like me. Having said that, I have also worked and known many great designers who had taken the formal path of learning design from established educational institutions.

Many people often reach out to me asking if they should enrol into a college or attempt to learn design by themselves. While self-learning may seem like an efficient, optimised and inexpensive process, it isn't without it's own caveats. Similarly, the association of a brand or a college to your name alone cannot do the magic you would want it to.

So in this video, I have covered some insights on Design Education from the perspective of a self-taught designer (i.e. me) and a college-taught designer, @sargamprakash . I hope it clears all the uncertainties :)

#design #ux #designcareer #designthinking #ui #userexperience #designeducation #iit #nid #designschool #selfimprovement #startup #productdesign #productmanagement #uidesign #uxdesign  #sapta  #saptarshipr

latestIgtvVideos.title: Click here to watch full video ⬇️
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
https://youtu.be/frtO9r7eFFg

"I have learned Photoshop and Illustrator. Which other tool do I need to learn to be a UX Designer?"
This is a question that I get asked a lot with various combinations of different tools. Tools and hands-on are just one half of UX design and there is a whole different world which is the analytical side of design. Knowing to use only tools can at best make you a UI designer. Nothing more. But having said all these, tools are also very important. They are the means using which you transform your ideas into artefacts that people can use and experience. In a world where there are so many different tools to choose from, it can get very overwhelming for beginners. So, here is this video, I have grouped the popular tools based on their function under 3 broad categories. I have also spoken about which ones you should learn and which ones you may skip :)﻿
.
.
.
.
.
.
#ui #ux #design #designtools #sketch #figma #adobexd #uidesign #productdesign #prototyping #career #uxdesign #cinema4d #photoshop #illustrator #aftereffects #startup #saptarshipr #sapta

caption:
If You Can Build Fast, This Room Is For You 🔥

This reel is about VibeCon India in Bangalore, where just 300 people from across the country get in, build live, and the winner walks away with a direct Y Combinator interview, cash prizes, investor access from YC, Lightspeed, Razorpay, and even a billboard in Bangalore. 
It’s a filtered room of designers who can ship, founders who can build, and operators who actually execute, and if you believe you belong in that room.
.
.
Hashtags:
#startup #ycombinator #bangalore #buildinpublic
.
.
Tags:

caption:
India’s first MUSICAL road! 🎶

This video showcases India’s first melody road built on the coastal road in Mumbai. The road plays the song “Jai Ho” the moment a vehicle passes by.
 
No speakers, just specially designed strips under the tyres that turn vibrations into music.
.
.
#musicalroad #jaihoroad #mumbai #design
.
.
[musical road mumbai, jai ho musical road, mumbai coastal road rumble strips, india first musical road, musical highway india, behavioral design, mumbai coastal road features, road design india,  physics of musical road,  interactive design, design, sapta, saptarshi prakash]
firstComment: Close kar diya gaya public ki complaint se noise disturbance

latestComments.text: Close kar diya gaya public ki complaint se noise disturbance
Just imagine the traffic like situation in this road ?! How it would sound?  like a melody or misery ?
I didn’t know it was loud until I saw complaints filed by around 600 residents. Damn.
Neighborhood are complaining for the sound but when u drive it is fun

replies.text: @flattech26 Oh.. is it that loud that it disturbs the neighbours?? 😮
@saptarshiux It is the constant "Jai ho" melody that keeps them off, but they will need to deal with it. The same thing happened in Japan and other places where they tried similar things before.

caption:
Kicking off this page with a frame that speaks for itself. 📸 Captured a candid, relaxed moment with @saptarshiux - AVP at @swiggyindia , designer, and
absolute inspiration at the Designing Products at Scale
hosted by @headstart.bengaluru .There's something
timeless about black and white that really brings out the
focus and calm of a leader. Loving the sharp contrast and depth the @xiaomiindia 17 Ultra let me pull out of this shot. Here's to capturing many more faces, streets, and stories around Bengaluru! Let me know what you think in the comments.
.
.
.
.
.
#Swiggy #PortraitPhotography #BengaluruDiaries
#Xiaomi17Ultra

latestIgtvVideos.title: Click here to watch full video ⬇️

caption:
Spotted something on the KKR jersey that I can’t unsee.

A sponsor logo that accidentally reads as another team’s name. Not because the logo is bad. Because in the IPL, two-letter abbreviations already mean something.

Design lesson: context rewrites meaning. Always check what else lives in the same space as your work.
Tell me you saw this too.
firstComment: Understandable. But doesn’t happen with me.

latestComments.text: Understandable. But doesn’t happen with me.

I think RR cable does brilliant marketing throughout time, and they already have a good identity and catchy tagline. IPL audiences know the logo of Rajasthan, I don't think anyone will be confused there.
Chutiya spotted with one mic and one camera!!!
The context is right but as a dealer of the cables , first thing that comes up by reading it is the actual brand instead of the team 😂

replies.text: @ankitnagar.co True, and I mostly agree. But this isnt some ambitious sports brand failing at identity 😁 Its an electric cable company accidentally landing inside a cricket scorecard ecosystem 🥹 In match graphics, tables and scorecards, RR is already mentally reserved for Rajasthan Royals. Two letters never really stood a chance there.

@saptarshiux Fair point on context. But once you step into IPL real estate, you’re not just placing a logo, you’re competing with existing mental shortcuts. Two letters were always going to lose. The job is to design for that constraint, not ignore it.

metaData.biography:
🤌 Simplifying Design & AI for Everyone

latestIgtvVideos.title: Click here for full video ⬇️
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Full Video: https://youtu.be/oaFK-hInvi8

I am a self taught designer, i.e. I taught design to my own self without enrolling into any course or curriculum. Some of the greatest designers that I have worked with were also self-taught, just like me. Having said that, I have also worked and known many great designers who had taken the formal path of learning design from established educational institutions.

Many people often reach out to me asking if they should enrol into a college or attempt to learn design by themselves. While self-learning may seem like an efficient, optimised and inexpensive process, it isn't without it's own caveats. Similarly, the association of a brand or a college to your name alone cannot do the magic you would want it to.

So in this video, I have covered some insights on Design Education from the perspective of a self-taught designer (i.e. me) and a college-taught designer, @sargamprakash . I hope it clears all the uncertainties :)

#design #ux #designcareer #designthinking #ui #userexperience #designeducation #iit #nid #designschool #selfimprovement #startup #productdesign #productmanagement #uidesign #uxdesign  #sapta  #saptarshipr

latestIgtvVideos.title: Click here to watch full video ⬇️
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
https://youtu.be/frtO9r7eFFg

"I have learned Photoshop and Illustrator. Which other tool do I need to learn to be a UX Designer?"
This is a question that I get asked a lot with various combinations of different tools. Tools and hands-on are just one half of UX design and there is a whole different world which is the analytical side of design. Knowing to use only tools can at best make you a UI designer. Nothing more. But having said all these, tools are also very important. They are the means using which you transform your ideas into artefacts that people can use and experience. In a world where there are so many different tools to choose from, it can get very overwhelming for beginners. So, here is this video, I have grouped the popular tools based on their function under 3 broad categories. I have also spoken about which ones you should learn and which ones you may skip :)﻿
.
.
.
.
.
.
#ui #ux #design #designtools #sketch #figma #adobexd #uidesign #productdesign #prototyping #career #uxdesign #cinema4d #photoshop #illustrator #aftereffects #startup #saptarshipr #sapta

caption:
The energy in the room was unmatched! ✨ A massive shoutout to everyone who joined our Headstart community for an epic evening discussing "Designing Products at Scale."

Huge thanks to our brilliant speakers, @motwanisuhas - co founder of @theproductfolks and @saptarshiux - AVP of design @swiggyindia , for dropping major knowledge bombs on how to build and design for millions. Here’s a look back at some of our favorite moments captured on camera. ❣️💟

#productdesign #startup #community #startupindia

caption:
I tried this mouse thinking it’s just another productivity upgrade.

Didn’t expect it to keep up with… everything.

Design, focus, random late-night switches in vibe.
It just stayed consistent while I kept changing.

At some point, you stop noticing the tool.
That’s when it gets interesting.

Now I’m just curious…
how far can one mouse actually go?

#designer #mxmaster4 #productivity
firstComment: Can I know, Why so much content/stories just on Mouse?

latestComments.text: Can I know, Why so much content/stories just on Mouse?
Cant wait to receive it and use it @logitech.india 🔥
Kitne baar ek hi mouse ka promotion karoge sir

replies.text: @yashtyagi12527 I haven’t but I have seen pictures. How are they?

caption:
The wait is over! Announcing the 3 winners of the @logitech 4 giveaway. Swipe through. 
Congratulations, winners! Someone from my team will reach out to you soon 😇

Thank you everyone for participating. Many comments were simply hilarious! I wish I could give away more. But I had to pick only 3.
